title: Dark Factory: OpenClaw Ships Faster Than You Can Read the Diff — Vincent Koc, OpenClaw
summary: Vincent Koc describes OpenClaw's approach to running 60-70 AI coding agents in parallel, achieving 3,000 commits in one day through organized swim lanes of 15-20 concurrent sessions. The talk emphasizes managing agent reasoning tokens efficiently, distinguishing between productive and unproductive reasoning, and optimizing token utilization rather than maximizing it.
